mapper.sql: a.id, a.asset_code, a.asset_name, a.property_id, p.property_code, a.category, a.status
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM asset a WHERE a.is_deleted = FALSE
AND ( LOWER(a.asset_code) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(a.asset_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(a.category) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(a.status) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') )
SELECT FROM asset a INNER JOIN property p ON p.id = a.property_id WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.is_deleted = FALSE
SELECT FROM asset a INNER JOIN property p ON p.id = a.property_id WHERE a.asset_code = #{assetCode} AND a.is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO asset (tenant_id, property_id, asset_code, asset_name, category, status) VALUES (1, #{propertyId}, #{assetCode}, #{assetName}, #{category}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE asset SET property_id = #{request.propertyId}, asset_code = #{request.assetCode}, asset_name = #{request.assetName}, category = #{request.category}, status = #{request.status}, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE asset SET is_deleted = TRUE, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
